title: ILE Core
summary: ILE is the public root memory: compiler checks, citations, and normalized context weights.
note: Public memory carries the math and invariants, not private scripture.

title: First Words
note: The conductor checks retrieval state before generation.

title: Potato Doctrine
summary: Dell Inspiron 15 7579, i7-7500U class: small context, strict citations, local first.
note: Potato mode lets ordinary CPUs run the compiler path.

title: Citations
summary: Citations or it did not happen.
note: Strict modes require answer refs that map to retrieved context.

title: Weight Sum
summary: Fractal context normalizes: sum_i w_i = 1.0. SQLite orbits ILE.
note: Only curated atoms attach to the ILE-rooted thread.
